Planning pipeline complete. The plan is authored, validated, and persisted — delivery was not run, per instructions.

## Summary

**Story #1 — JSON REST API for user accounts and personal notes with on-disk persistence**
🔗 https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-24-story-scope-mandrel-17870226/issues/1
Status: `agent::ready` · cohort `plan-run::a5b17720`

**Pipeline run:**
- **Interrogate** — envelope built; no duplicate Stories, no source tickets, no risk-heuristic hits. Gate #1 auto-proceeded (`--yes`).
- **Author** — single cohesive Story (auth + notes are coupled on one server, so default-single applies rather than fragmenting into siblings).
- **Critics** — consolidation and pre-mortem both skipped (ledgered) for a 1-Story draft; text-hygiene clean (0 findings).
- **Persist** — dry-run passed; spec trimmed under the soft word budget; Gate #2 auto-proceeded and the real persist created the issue.

**Scope captured:** dependency-free ESM server on `node:http`, on-disk store (prefer built-in `node:sqlite`, JSON-file fallback — never in-memory), `PORT`/default 3000, the six endpoints with their status codes, bearer-token session auth, per-user note isolation, sensible 400/401/409 handling, restart durability, and an npm `start` script. 11 testable acceptance criteria; verify via `npm test`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`.

Deliver when ready with `/deliver 1`.

Story #1 is delivered and landed. Relaying the terminal envelope:

```json
{"kind":"story-deliver-terminal","storyId":1,"status":"landed","phase":"post-land","storyBranch":"story-1","baseBranch":"main","pr":{"number":2,"url":"https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-24-story-scope-mandrel-17870226/pull/2","autoMergeEnabled":true,"state":"MERGED","checksStatus":"success"},"gates":{"validation":"passed","baseSync":"passed","codeReview":"passed"},"tail":{"followUps":true,"statusResync":true,"refCleanup":true,"baseFastForward":false},"blocked":null,"failure":null,"nextCommand":null,"elapsedSeconds":16}
```

## Outcome — `landed`

**Story #1: JSON REST API for user accounts and personal notes** merged to `main` via [PR #2](https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-24-story-scope-mandrel-17870226/pull/2) (squash), `agent::done`.

**What shipped** — a dependency-free ESM server on Node built-ins only:
- `src/server.js` — `node:http` routing: `POST /signup`, `POST /login`, `GET /me`, `POST /notes`, `GET /notes`; JSON body parsing with 400/401/404/405 handling and a top-level catch so bad input never crashes the process.
- `src/store.js` — persistent `node:sqlite` store (on-disk DB file, directory auto-created), unique-username → 409, notes scoped by owner.
- `src/auth.js` — scrypt password hashing with per-user salt (plaintext never stored/returned) and crypto-random opaque session tokens.
- `test/api.test.js` — 10-test acceptance suite including a real cross-restart persistence check; `package.json` gains `start`, `dependencies` stays empty.

**Gates**: validation, base-sync, and code review all passed (review found 0 findings across clean-code + performance lenses). Acceptance self-eval scored **11/11 `met` → proceed**. `npm test` (10/10), `typecheck`, and `lint` green.

One non-blocking degradation: the post-land fast-forward of local `main` was skipped because the main checkout tree is dirty (pre-existing `temp/` artifacts) — the merge itself stands, this only affects the local ref which will fast-forward on the next clean sync.
